scripts.dev: concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@callhr/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@callhr/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@callhr/contracts && npm run build --workspace=@callhr/api && npm run build --workspace=@callhr/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@callhr/api && npm run test --workspace=@callhr/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@callhr/contracts && npm run typecheck --workspace=@callhr/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@callhr/web
